title: Dry-Run Parity Before Field Test
content: All dry-run tests must pass before field test begins.

title: Credential Vault Approved
content: Credential vault must be reviewed and approved.

title: Request Signing Reviewed
content: Request signing implementation must be reviewed.

title: Network Transport Reviewed
content: Network transport implementation must be reviewed.

title: Submit Gate Temporary Unlock Approval
content: Explicit approval for temporary submit unlock during field test.

title: Cancel Gate Temporary Unlock Approval
content: Explicit approval for temporary cancel unlock during field test.

title: Reconciliation Gate Temporary Unlock Approval
content: Explicit approval for temporary reconciliation unlock during field test.

title: Symbol Allowlist
content: Only approved symbols allowed during field test.

title: Notional Cap
content: Per-order notional cap set and enforced.

title: Daily Order Cap
content: Daily order cap set and enforced.

title: Manual Operator Present
content: Operator must be present during entire field test.

title: Kill Switch Armed
content: Kill switch must be armed and tested.

title: Audit Log External Backup
content: Audit log backed up to external storage before field test.

title: Rollback Rehearsal
content: Rollback procedure rehearsed before field test.

title: Post-Test Review
content: Post-test review required before next phase.
